_readme: ESP32 Flash Manager — Device Config Template. Edit this file to describe your device and its flash regions, then import it via Settings. Delete the underscore fields before importing — they are documentation only and will be ignored by the parser.

_instructions.step_1: Replace all placeholder values below with your actual device details.
_instructions.step_2: The chip_model must exactly match what esptool reports (visible in the console after Detect Device).
_instructions.step_4: Each region address must be a hex string e.g. 0x10000. Size is in bytes.
_instructions.step_5: Valid operations are: read, write, erase. Bootloader should be read-only.
_instructions.step_6: Save this file with a descriptive name e.g. my_esp32_device.json, then import it.

regions.name: Bootloader
regions.description: ESP32 second-stage bootloader. Read only — writing here can brick the device.
